claims.summary: High entropy silence can feel abandoned sooner than the fixed 60s stale window; a 30s high-entropy stale window was suggested.
claims.rationale: The bridge already has entropy/pressure-sensitive reflective stale windows. Changing the actual stale classifier to expire faster would alter live timing semantics, so it remains an explicit operator-gated change.

claims.summary: Mode packing just above/below the 0.25 felt-dead-zone threshold should be visible as a tactile pressure/porosity transition watch.
claims.rationale: Focused WS tests verify the read-only felt-dead-zone state and thresholds are surfaced without local control mutation.
